/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MultiNodeBench.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MultiNodeBench.dir/MultiNodeBench.cpp.o -o MultiNodeBench  ../Furrballs/libFurrballs.a ../numatic/libNumatic.a ../vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/librocksdb.a -lnuma ../vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/librocksdb.a ../vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/liblz4.a ../vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/libz.a ../vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/libtbb.a ../vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/libxxhash.a ../vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/libz.a ../vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/liblz4.a ../vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/libtbb.a -ldl
